title: Directly Append Instead of Using String.valueOf()
description: Appending String.valueOf() to a String can decrease the code readability. It's recommended to directly append the value instead of wrapping it with String.valueOf().
recommendation: Replace the use of String.valueOf() by directly appending the value to the String.
impact: Improves code readability by reducing unnecessary complexity.

checks.message: Replace the use of String.valueOf() by directly appending the value to the String.
